attributes.action: Revert the number on the Hogwarts Express in the new HP series from 6989 to 5972
attributes.additional_details: It is a popular fun fact within Harry Potter fans, and keeping the new numbers will annoy them, and cause civil unrest
attributes.background: Make sure the HBO Harry Potter series changes the numbers on the front of the Hogwarts Express from the new 6989 to the original 5972 - like in the original Harry Potter films and books.
